name: FAQ Search
description: A search-driven FAQ section with live keyword filtering and inline match highlighting, ideal for help centers and large knowledge bases where customers need to find specific answers fast. Combines a prominent search bar with an accordion result list and a graceful empty state.

descriptions.descriptive: Full-width section anchored by a single rounded search input with a leading magnifier icon and inline clear button. Below sits a divider-line accordion that filters live as the user types, with matched substrings highlighted in a subtle primary tint inside both questions and answers.
descriptions.usage: Best for product help centers, support pages, and policy hubs where the FAQ list grows past ten items. Use when scanning is the primary user task — the search-first pattern outperforms category browsing once a library exceeds roughly twelve questions.
descriptions.audienceFit: Ideal for SaaS platforms, fintech, and B2B tools whose customers arrive with a specific question already in mind. Appeals to power users and admins who prefer typing a keyword over scrolling, and to support teams who want to deflect tickets without forcing visitors to read every entry.
